task.question: What color is the last physical "Mahalo my dude" sticker that appears on-screen?
initial_trace_steps: I watched the video from the beginning to locate the instances where a physical "Mahalo my dude" sticker appears on-screen. The first time happens at 00:01, and it's a yellow sticker, the second time is at 00:07, and it's white. It appears briefly again at 00:10 (black), 00:12 (white), and 00:14 (white). I watched the video until the end and found no other instance where a physical "Mahalo my dude" sticker is visible. For this reason, the last time a physical "Mahalo my dude" sticker appears on-screen is at 00:14, where a white version of the sticker is being placed on a car window.
